qtype: Properties of integers (range, median, mode), mean calculation
tex:
(a) Mei writes down five integers.
\newline

(b) The lowest integer is 8.
\newline

(c) The range is 9.
\newline

(d) The median is 15.
\newline

(e) The total of the five integers is 66.
\newline

(f) There is no mode.
\newline

Write down the five integers.
\newline
}

Huan writes down four numbers.
\newline
\\
The mean of these four numbers is 17.
\newline

He writes down a fifth number.
\newline
\\
The mean of these five numbers is 20.
\newline
}

Find the fifth number.
\newline
}

content.content:
The total of the five integers is 66.
\newline
